text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is about to kick off! The
Umamusume selected by fan vote will soon take
each other on here at Hanshin Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Of course, special attention is fixed on the battle
between the Empress, Air Groove, and the
Otherworldly Front-Runner, Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is on the edge of their seats, itching to
see them face off!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think'll win? Air Groove or Silence
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
Whoever wins, one thing's for sure—it's gonna be
a crazy intense race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As Air Groove makes her way to the track...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(She's come a long way since our scrimmage.
She's... extraordinary.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't plan on losing either.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (I can't afford to lose... There's no way I can lose!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I can't, then that means... Suzuka's running
really is...
